summary: Fresh instances after setup + snapshot left status.json empty (wedge_complete=false, completeness={}) and pending-validations.md with raw {brand-name} placeholder + no seeded checkpoints. setup-brand now substitutes the placeholder across all 4 md files and seeds the baseline gates; snapshot-brand now triggers validate-resources silently post-save and appends inferred fields to the Context gate.

changes.reason: E1: widen placeholder substitution to all 4 md files at brand root; spell out pending-validations seeding with plain-language source tags per the operator-contract no-jargon rule.
Step 7 post-save: append one [ ] line per mode=proposed field to pending-validations.md § Context gate, trigger validate-resources silently, surface only MAJOR/CRITICAL.

operator_impact: post-setup, status.json and pending-validations.md now reflect real state. No action for existing instances — next snapshot-brand run per brand regenerates the surfaces.
tested_on: SKILL.md edits, verified against a beauty pilot test onboarding traces in /tmp/phantom-test-v2619
caught_by: same fresh-instance onboarding test as v2.6.20 (findings #4, #5).
known_gaps: No auto-migration of existing pending-validations.md files stuck with {brand-name} — operator runs snapshot-brand or hand-edits.
validate-resources trigger is an SKILL.md instruction, not hook-enforced. If agent skips it the refresh is lost. Future: PostToolUse hook on write-to-context ending detection (candidate v2.7.x).
